textByHash.07a66986aafe670c051e8aaaa6a982dcc0f2c39b: Mr Gianne is the one to talk to if you want to sell any dishes you've made yourself. He is the owner and head chef of this establishment. If on the other hand you are more interested in making food to deliver, which can
textByHash.1cebb2208cad4e60997fbd58ef5d2af9a7fb998d: be quite lucrative, you should talk to Mr Giannes son Aluft Gianne jnr. Just don't call him Lufty, he doesn't like it.
textByHash.2ee73b962655fc42d89aa43239f7cb493bbb4859: Hello madam, can I tempt you with any of the dishes on our new menu?
textByHash.381b2c96a3538b422d0ae0ef5f31a7ac93961073: not be accepted by some people as the 'real' thing.
textByHash.38f6c958cec82cea3673da603af89bba2282bd8f: That's your choice sir, enjoy your stay.
textByHash.3a59526b8f23729f3fdf73700dc675d5efce1aba: Hello sir, can I tempt you with any of the dishes on our new menu?
textByHash.9b01e3868be27d1f97db6c05f7578b0b76b90f80: I hope you like what you see. Although all these premade dishes are good to eat - they were made by the last human assistant chef. He wasn't up to Chef's exacting standards - and you may find that they will
textByHash.ca8b8a2e75100d9eee6ec423c0f91f01efe85b90: That's your choice madam, enjoy your stay.
